news.title: 设计通用人工智能危害事件报告系统
news.summary_en: We introduce a conceptual framework and provide considerations for the institutional design of AI incident reporting (IR) systems, i.e., processes for collecting information about safety- and rights-related events caused by general-purpose AI.
news.original_title: Designing Incident Reporting Systems for Harms from General-Purpose AI
news.summary_cn: 2026年4月6日消息，兰德公司发布研究报告，探讨如何为通用人工智能（GPAI）系统建立有效的事件报告机制。报告指出，随着人工智能技术的广泛应用，其潜在风险也日益凸显，建立标准化的事件报告系统对于及时识别和应对AI相关危害至关重要。报告提出了多层次报告框架的设计原则，包括保护举报人、确保数据隐私、促进跨机构信息共享等关键要素。

news.title: 无限潜能——病毒式 uplift 情景洞察：通用人工智能演习事后行动报告
news.summary_en: In this after-action report, the authors describe a series of exercises centered on the misuse of artificial intelligence models to generate novel biological threats and intended to elicit policy options that could help reduce the risks and impact.
news.original_title: Infinite Potential—Insights from the Viral Uplift Scenario: After-Action Report from a Sequence of Day After Artificial General Intelligence Exercises
news.summary_cn: 2026年4月6日消息，兰德公司发布前瞻性研究报告，基于一系列通用人工智能（AGI）演习的事后行动报告，分析人工智能快速发展对社会经济的潜在影响。报告通过模拟演习的方式，探讨了在AGI技术实现突破的情况下，政府、企业和社会可能面临的挑战和应对策略。
